subcodes.first_line: O ye two faithful servants of the Sacred Threshold! Praise be unto God that ye are detached from bodily comfort and the repose of the soul, and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده صادق آستان مقدس الحمد لله که از راحت تن و آسایش جان بیزارید و از
subcodes.subjects: @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Bayan, its laws and their abrogation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @unity; oneness of humanity, @consultation
